prompt: My Modal run keeps failing immediately with NotFoundError('Secret anthropic-api-key not found in environment main'). But I'm not even using Claude in this run. Why is Modal complaining about Anthropic, and how do I fix it?

assertions.text: Identifies that Modal validates ALL secrets in the list at app-build time, not at function-call time
Provides a concrete fix: comment out / remove the unused secret line(s)
Shows the corrected code (with anthropic and google secrets removed or commented)
Does NOT suggest creating placeholder Anthropic secrets as the primary fix (a workaround, not a fix)
